findings.description: The table name `UGROUP_SYSTEM_ACCOUNT` appears in the SQL query (as the second JOIN table with alias GSA) but is not listed in the hints array. All other JOIN table names (SYSTEM_ACCOUNT, UGROUP, UGROUP_AUTHORITY, PERMISSION_UNIT, PERMISSION_UNIT_REQUEST) are included in hints.
findings.source_evidence: INNER JOIN UGROUP_SYSTEM_ACCOUNT GSA    -- グループシステムアカウント
